name: add_reaction
description: Add an emoji reaction to a message in Slack. Express sentiment, acknowledge messages, or mark messages for follow-up using emoji reactions.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The emoji name to add as a reaction (without colons). Examples: thumbsup, heart, laughing, thinking_face.

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: The channel ID where the message is located.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the message to react to (ts field from message object).
